label: Nearby parking options
description: Public/paid lots within walking distance; with prices if possible

follow_up.label: What's the construction and when does it end?

label: Step-free entry to the building?
description: Whether a guest can enter the building without using stairs.

label: Ramps / accessibility aids present?
description: Free text about any ramps, lifts, or accessibility aids the visitor observes.

label: Other accessibility / mobility notes
description: Free text — anything else relevant to mobility-impaired guests (door thresholds, grab bars, etc.).

label: Smart lock device ID / serial
description: Per step; only if Smart Lock. Needed for Breezeway/Conduit setup

label: Overall check-in notes (not per-step)
description: Only if unusual; distinct from per-step lock notes

label: Fuse box location
description: Often per building, but may be per-unit in older European stock — note location precisely

label: Facility manager / Hausverwaltung contact
description: Important for ops handover — try to obtain on-site (name + phone or email).

label: Common areas / building facilities
description: One entry per shared space. Visitor walks the building and documents each common area found.

label: Utility type
description: One entry per utility company. Visitor asks Hausmeister/property manager for emergency contacts (Vattenfall, Stadtwerke, etc.).

label: Procedure category
description: One entry per staff-facing procedure (e.g. Bathroom ventilation, Fire alarm response, No electricity response). Visitor documents observed steps with photos / video.

label: Can Arbio take over existing cleaning?
Number of balconies
description: May vary per individual unit within a category — capture per unit if they differ

label: Location of unit in building
description: e.g. 'second floor, east wing'. Genuinely per-individual-unit — capture per unit; unit_category is the closest scope we have

label: Floor of unit
description: Genuinely per-individual-unit; in mixed-floor buildings capture per unit even within one category

label: View comments
description: Only if meaningfully different from owner claim

label: Apartment + bathroom door clear widths
description: Narrowest door width (cm) inside the apartment. Critical for wheelchair access.

label: Actual capacity / bed setup if mismatch
Item name
description: Name of the appliance/amenity (e.g. 'Washing machine'). Pre-set if the item came from the starter list; editable.

label: Item kind (discriminator)
description: Discriminator: Appliance | Equipment | Amenity. Usually pre-set per starter item (most starter items = Appliance).

label: Brand / manufacturer
description: Free text. Blank unless visitor records it.

label: Location in unit
description: Where the item is (e.g. kitchen, bathroom, hallway closet).

label: Operation notes / how to use
description: Free text or short notes. Goes to instructions[] or notes on PMS side.

label: Availability type
description: How the item is provided to the guest.

label: How-to-use video
description: Upload a short video of how the appliance works (replaces the previous Y/N video-needed flag).

label: Fire extinguisher last service date visible?
Check-out step name
description: One entry per property-specific check-out step. Skip the block if none.
